category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Bangladesh market.

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入孟加拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Bangladesh market-access requirements — BSTI mandatory certification for lamps, BDS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 safety and photobiological standards, SREDA energy efficiency labelling, and BTRC radio-equipment approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards (GB 30255 energy efficiency, GB 7000 luminaire safety).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与孟加拉国市场准入要求差距对照——包括 BSTI 灯具强制认证、BDS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 安全及光生物标准、SREDA 能效标签、以及智能灯具的 BTRC 无线电设备核准——与中国 GB 标准（GB 30255 能效、GB 7000 灯具安全）对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與孟加拉市場准入要求差距對照——包括 BSTI 燈具強制認證、BDS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 安全及光生物標準、SREDA 能效標籤、以及智能燈具的 BTRC 無線電設備核准——與中國 GB 標準（GB 30255 能效、GB 7000 燈具安全）對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Bangladesh law, BSTI certification marking requirements, applicable BDS/IEC standards, SREDA energy efficiency and labelling rules, and BTRC radio approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行孟加拉国法律、BSTI 认证标志要求、适用的 BDS/IEC 标准、SREDA 能效及标签规则，以及 BTRC 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行孟加拉法律、BSTI 認證標誌要求、適用的 BDS/IEC 標準、SREDA 能效及標籤規則，以及 BTRC 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Bangladesh must obtain BSTI (Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution) mandatory certification for lamps and luminaires against the relevant BDS standards (which adopt IEC 60598 for luminaire safety and IEC 60598/62560 for lamps); demonstrate electrical safety to BDS/IEC 60598 and, for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 60560/62560; address photobiological safety to IEC 62471 where required; comply with SREDA (Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority) energy efficiency and energy-labelling rules where the product falls in a regulated category; obtain BTRC (Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission) approval for any smart/wireless luminaire with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth; and import through an in-country importer with the BSTI mark and proper marking via the ports of Chattogram or Mongla. Bangladesh has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime, so EU RoHS substance restrictions do not have a direct Bangladesh legal counterpart. None of these Bangladesh requirements are covered by China's GB standards (GB 30255 energy efficiency, GB 7000 luminaire safety) or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向孟加拉国出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：取得 BSTI（孟加拉国标准与检验机构）针对灯及灯具的强制认证，并符合相关 BDS 标准（BDS 采用 IEC 60598 作为灯具安全标准、采用 IEC 60598/62560 作为灯标准）；依据 BDS/IEC 60598 证明电气安全，对自镇流灯依据 IEC 60560/62560；在有要求时依据 IEC 62471 处理光生物安全；当产品属于受管制类别时符合 SREDA（可持续与可再生能源发展署）能效及能源标签规则；对任何具备 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙的智能/无线灯具取得 BTRC（孟加拉国电信监管委员会）核准；并通过在地进口商、附 BSTI 标志及正确标识经由吉大港（Chattogram）或蒙拉港（Mongla）进口。孟加拉国没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS、电池或室外噪声法规，因此欧盟 RoHS 物质限制在孟加拉国没有直接对应的法律制度。上述孟加拉国要求均不被中国 GB 标准（GB 30255 能效、GB 7000 灯具安全）或 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向孟加拉出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：取得 BSTI（孟加拉標準與檢驗機構）針對燈及燈具的強制認證，並符合相關 BDS 標準（BDS 採用 IEC 60598 作為燈具安全標準、採用 IEC 60598/62560 作為燈標準）；依據 BDS/IEC 60598 證明電氣安全，對自鎮流燈依據 IEC 60560/62560；在有要求時依據 IEC 62471 處理光生物安全；當產品屬於受管制類別時符合 SREDA（可持續與可再生能源發展署）能效及能源標籤規則；對任何具備 Wi-Fi 或藍牙的智能/無線燈具取得 BTRC（孟加拉電信監管委員會）核准；並通過在地進口商、附 BSTI 標誌及正確標識經由吉大港（Chattogram）或蒙拉港（Mongla）進口。孟加拉沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、電池或室外噪聲法規，因此歐盟 RoHS 物質限制在孟加拉沒有直接對應的法律制度。上述孟加拉要求均不被中國 GB 標準（GB 30255 能效、GB 7000 燈具安全）或 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each release cycle; BSTI mandatory product list, BDS standard adoptions, SREDA energy-labelling scope, and BTRC approval rules re-verified per cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Bangladesh requirements must be re-verified against the current BSTI mandatory certification list, the applicable BDS/IEC editions, SREDA notifications, and BTRC equipment-approval guidance on each review cycle.
